_comment: Ecosystem: Ancient God Remains Ecology (Land of the Ancient God). Full food web with 6 trophic layers and 4 seasonal/environmental states. Prime Directive: ecology exists objectively; player perception determines what they observe. No-Locked-Upgrades: all seasonal states are reachable by time/weather/event.
name: Ancient God Remains Ecology
description: The unique ecology that forms around Ancient God remains — everything is altered by god-essence.

slumber.note: Ancient god slumbers; ecology subdued but still mutated.

stirring.note: Ancient god stirs; all beasts grow restless.

awakening.note: Ancient god awakens; entire ecology restructures; guardian beasts manifest.

god_tribulation.note: God tribulation; apex beasts manifest; reality warps.

perception_tiers.mortal: Sees beasts and terrain; does not perceive trophic structure.
perception_tiers.foundation_establishment: Perceives trophic layers and seasonal shifts.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Perceives mutation potential and bloodline flows.
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Perceives complete ecology as a living system.
